svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="三层数据新鲜度" id="data-freshness"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-152" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="统计中台三层数据新鲜度:T+1 汇总表 + 小时级 + Redis 实时(禁止扫原始表)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="440" width="920" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="T+1 层 · 昨日及以前" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="380" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T1A" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="每日 00:05 定时任务
StatisticsCalculationJob
→ stat_daily_summary 汇总表" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="340" x="80" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="小时层 · 当日分时" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="380" x="490" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T2A" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="每小时 :05 定时任务
→ stat_hourly_trade
支撑 24h 热力图" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="340" x="510" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d4a017;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="实时层 · 今日累计" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="810" x="60" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T3A" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="订单支付事件 → Redis INCR(今日 GMV)
DAU 用 Set SADD userId 去重 · TTL 24h
ScreenDataCounter 实时累加" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="760" x="80" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Q" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="大屏一次请求拼装三层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="340" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RULE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="铁律:统计查询全部走汇总表,禁止扫原始业务表" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="440" x="280" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="T1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="Q"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="T2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="Q"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="T3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="Q"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
